scripts.docker:up: pnpm exec dotenvx run -f .env -- docker compose -f compose.yaml up -d
scripts.docker:down: pnpm exec dotenvx run -f .env -- docker compose -f compose.yaml down
scripts.db:pull: NODE_OPTIONS='--import tsx' pnpm exec dotenvx run -f .env -- tsx scripts/preprocess-drizzle.ts
scripts.db:migrate: pnpm exec dotenvx run -f .env -- node-pg-migrate -j ts --tsx true --tsconfig tsconfig.json
scripts.db:migrate:up: pnpm exec dotenvx run -f .env -- node-pg-migrate up -j ts --tsx true --tsconfig tsconfig.json
scripts.db:migrate:down: pnpm exec dotenvx run -f .env -- node-pg-migrate down -j ts --tsx true --tsconfig tsconfig.json
scripts.db:migrate:prod: pnpm exec node-pg-migrate up -j ts --tsx true --tsconfig tsconfig.json
